chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-400 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A No.2635/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection (s) 3. For orders on M.A No.2636/2026 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 01.04.2026 Mr.Bashir Ahmed Almani, Advocate for applicant ******* 1. Urgency granted. 2. Objection(s) Overruled. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicant Sajjad Ahmed son of Abdullah Khan Almani seeks protective bail in FIR No.81 of 2024 registered at P.S Mehran District Mirpurkhas for offences under Section 489-F PPC. Learned Counsel contends that this is a false case registered against the applicant due to malafide intentions; that the applicant being law abiding citizen wish to face trial; however, he apprehends that before reaching trial Court he might be arrested, humiliated and disgraced; therefore seeks legal protection Without dilating upon the merits of the case, the applicant is admitted to protective bail till 07.04.2026, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on 07.04.2026 or when the applicant surrenders himself before the trial Court, whichever is earlier. The bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
